title: copying already pulled docker image to oci format
body:
This is what i currently do to convert to oci format:
`skopeo copy docker://redis:latest oci:redis:latest`
But it copies directly from docker repository, How can i convert an image to oci format which already exist on my machine and can been seen on running command `docker images`?

comments.body: @gtrani can you confirm that `docker-daemon:` works, please?
@mtrmac Yes, as far as i remember it worked. Thanks.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
